steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content:
Before the blank: This designation is hypothetical — a complete clause.

After the blank: Proto-Nilo-Saharan is only postulated, its characteristics being inferred from the linguistic properties of its 199 daughters — a clause that elaborates on what makes the designation hypothetical.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation pattern
steps.content:
Per the answer key, the right pattern is hypothetical, however:. The comma sets off however after the first clause, and the colon introduces the elaboration that explains the hypothetical nature.

Choice A (comma after however) creates a comma splice; choice C splits the thought into two sentences and loses the elaborating link; choice D's colon before however places the colon in the wrong spot.

The answer is B.
